evals.prompt: Save this receipt photo — Costco run for groceries.
evals.expected_output: ingest-document (OCR) extracts the line items; receipt schema applied; entry routed to wiki/finances/ (or wiki/food/ if appropriate) with totals, vendor, date, category.

evals.prompt: Track this expense — pasted credit card line item.
evals.expected_output: A receipt entry created from the pasted text, routed to the right domain by category (e.g., vehicle for a gas-station charge).

evals.prompt: Ingest the Home Depot email receipt I just forwarded.
evals.expected_output: Email content parsed (paste handling or ingest-website if URL inside), receipt schema applied, routed to wiki/home/.
